questions.scenario: A platform team says the Orders API will run on GKE. What is the first platform boundary to identify?

options.text: The GKE cluster that owns the Kubernetes environment.
Only the billing account display name.

questions.explanation: The cluster is the Kubernetes environment where workloads run.

questions.scenario: Why does cluster region and network placement matter?

options.text: They affect cost, IAM, quotas, network paths, and workload placement.
They only change the color of the console page.

questions.explanation: A GKE cluster is managed, but it still lives in concrete GCP placement and network context.

questions.scenario: Which facts belong in a first GKE cluster review?
questions.explanation: Cluster review should name the platform boundary and its operating context.
